response.justification: The candidate lacks mandatory C++ experience on Windows and has no demonstrable domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking — their background is heavily focused on web, mobile, and open-source tools using TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with minimal C++ exposure limited to academic or non-financial projects.
strengths: Strong full-stack and polyglot programming skills across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated experience with CI/CD, testing frameworks, and DevOps practices
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical community engagement
concerns: No evidence of professional C++ development on Windows platform (required)
No experience or mention of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain
SQL experience is listed but not contextualized in financial systems or high-performance trading environments
